Notice And Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David H. Williams (510.271.0826) for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed and settlement complies with Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(f). Order and judgment signed in open Court.
